entries.source: Geography Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.

Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: fiosraigh tíortha, cathracha, aibhneacha, aeráidí, imirce, acmhainní, agus conas a mhúnlaíonn tíreolaíocht an saol.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.

At any time and without notice, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to (i) modify Terms of Service of Free Trial offer, or (ii) cancel such Free Trial offer.

D’fhéadfaí a iarraidh ort d’fhaisnéis bhilleála a chur isteach chun clárú don Free Trial. Má chuireann tú d’fhaisnéis bhilleála isteach agus tú ag clárú don Free Trial, ní ghearrfaidh Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) táille ort go dtí go mbeidh an Free Trial imithe in éag. Ar an lá deireanach den tréimhse Free Trial, mura bhfuil do Shíntiús curtha ar ceal agat, gearrfar na táillí Síntiúis infheidhme ort go huathoibríoch don chineál Síntiúis atá roghnaithe agat. Ag aon am agus gan fógra, coimeádann Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) an ceart (i) Téarmaí Seirbhíse thairiscint Free Trial a mhodhnú, nó (ii) tairiscint Free Trial den sórt sin a chur ar ceal.

Soláthróidh Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) fógra réasúnta roimh ré duit faoi aon athrú ar tháillí Síntiúis, ach níl sé faoi cheangal é sin a dhéanamh, chun deis a thabhairt duit do Shíntiús a fhoirceannadh sula dtiocfaidh an t-athrú i bhfeidhm. entries.value: Scarann mód pearsana stairiúla insamhladh ó fhíric dhoiciméadaithe agus déanann sé comhthéacs cuimhneach.

entries.source: Historical roleplay can make context, choices, and ideas easier to remember when it separates imagination from evidence.
entries.value: Is féidir le rólghlacadh stairiúil comhthéacs, roghanna, agus smaointe a dhéanamh níos éasca le cuimhneamh nuair a scarann sé samhlaíocht ó fhianaise.

entries.source: Historical roleplay is especially powerful when learners compare perspectives. After speaking with one figure, ask for another point of view:
entries.value: Bíonn rólghlacadh stairiúil thar a bheith cumhachtach nuair a chuireann foghlaimeoirí peirspictíochtaí i gcomparáid. Tar éis labhairt le figiúr amháin, iarr dearcadh eile:

entries.source: Historical worlds, persona conversations, case simulations, and roleplay for learning through situation.
entries.value: Domhain stairiúla, comhráite pearsana, insamhluithe cásanna, agus rólghlacadh don fhoghlaim trí chás.

entries.source: History becomes more memorable without pretending uncertainty has disappeared.

entries.source: History Cause-and-Effect AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS History Cause-and-Effect chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: díphacáil imeachtaí stairiúla trí chúiseanna, spreagthaí, iarmhairtí, agus féidearthachtaí eile.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: sainaithin botún coitianta;

entries.source: Identify gaps, ask clarifying questions, rebuild the explanation, and retry.
entries.value: Sainaithin bearnaí, cuir ceisteanna soiléirithe, atóg an míniú, agus bain triail eile as.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Sainaithin na spriocanna scoile is tábhachtaí: tacaíocht choincheapúil, leideanna obair bhaile, ullmhúchán scrúduithe, cuimhne ghníomhach, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, nó saibhriú.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: Má leanann cárta de theip, ná déan é a athrá amháin. Fiafraigh cén fáth a bhfuil sé deacair. Úsáid Socratic Instruction chun an mhíthuiscint a aimsiú, Math Step Coach le haghaidh bearnaí nós imeachta, nó leabharlann prasanna foghlama IS chun pras staidéir níos fearr a aimsiú.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Má tá an freagra dearfach, chabhraigh IS leat staidéar a dhéanamh. Má tá an freagra diúltach, ní níos mó léitheoireachta an chéad bheart eile. Is cleachtadh gníomhach é. Oscail Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, nó leabharlann prasanna foghlama IS agus tiontaigh an t-ábhar ina thasc a chaithfidh tú a thriail.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: Má tá intinn an fhoghlaimeora doiléir, mol 3 go 5 dhuine le cúiseanna, na modhanna is fearr, leibhéal conspóide, agus cáilíocht fianaise. Má ainmnítear duine ach go bhfuil an slis ama ar iarraidh, tairg leaganacha bríocha den duine sin roimh aon dialóg i gcarachtar. Nuair atá an duine agus an slis ama soiléir, tóg an seomra agus an sainchomhad sula labhraíonn an duine.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: Má tá intinn an fhoghlaimeora doiléir, réitigh í ina 3 rogha theacht isteach choincréiteacha agus stop le rogha a fháil. Má tá an pas soiléir cheana, oscail an domhan le cártaí modúlacha seachas mír.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Má mhothaíonn an freagra róleathan, cúng é. Iarr sampla amháin, míthuiscint amháin, ceist seiceála amháin, nó chéad chéim amháin eile. Má mhothaíonn sé ró-éasca, iarr dúshlán. Má mhothaíonn sé ró-dheacair, iarr droichead ón méid atá ar eolas agat cheana.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Más obair bhaile í an obair, tosaigh i Homework Coach. Más matamaitic í, úsáid Math Step Coach agus iarr air céim amháin ag an am a sheiceáil. Má tá tú ag iarraidh coincheap a thuiscint go domhain, úsáid Socratic Instruction agus freagair na ceisteanna sula n-iarrann tú achoimre.

entries.source: If you are a California resident, you are entitled to learn what data we collect about you, ask to delete your data and not to sell (share) it. To exercise your data protection rights, you can make certain requests and ask us:
entries.value: Más cónaitheoir California thú, tá tú i dteideal foghlaim cén sonraí a bhailímid fút, iarraidh orainn do shonraí a scriosadh, agus gan iad a dhíol (a roinnt). Chun do chearta cosanta sonraí a fheidhmiú, is féidir leat iarratais áirithe a dhéanamh agus iarraidh orainn:

entries.source: If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please email us at support@inspir.app If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:
entries.value: Más cónaitheoir den Aontas Eorpach (AE) agus den Limistéar Eorpach Eacnamaíoch (LEE) thú, tá cearta áirithe cosanta sonraí agat, atá clúdaithe ag GDPR. Tá sé mar aidhm againn céimeanna réasúnta a ghlacadh chun ligean duit do Shonraí Pearsanta a cheartú, a leasú, a scriosadh, nó úsáid do Shonraí Pearsanta a theorannú. Más mian leat a bheith curtha ar an eolas faoi na Sonraí Pearsanta atá againn fút agus más mian leat iad a bhaint ónár gcórais, seol ríomhphost chugainn ag support@inspir.app Más cónaitheoir den Aontas Eorpach (AE) agus den Limistéar Eorpach Eacnamaíoch (LEE) thú, tá cearta áirithe cosanta sonraí agat, atá clúdaithe ag GDPR. Tá sé mar aidhm againn céimeanna réasúnta a ghlacadh chun ligean duit do Shonraí Pearsanta a cheartú, a leasú, a scriosadh, nó úsáid do Shonraí Pearsanta a theorannú. I gcúinsí áirithe, tá na cearta cosanta sonraí seo a leanas agat:

entries.source: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app
entries.value: Má tá aon cheist agat faoin bPolasaí Príobháideachais seo, déan teagmháil linn trí ríomhphost: support@inspir.app

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Má ghreamaíonn tú ceist obair bhaile agus má chóipeálann tú an freagra deiridh, b’fhéidir go gcríochnóidh tú an tasc, ach níor thóg tú an scil. Má iarrann tú leid, má mhíníonn tú do smaointeoireacht, má chuireann tú do fhreagra i gcomparáid, agus má thriaileann tú fadhb chosúil, éiríonn IS ina chomhpháirtí staidéir seachas ina aicearra.

entries.source: If you wish to purchase any product or service made available through Service (“Purchase”), you may be asked to supply certain information relevant to your Purchase including but not limited to, your credit or debit card number, the expiration date of your card, your billing address, and your shipping information. You represent and warrant that: (i) you have the legal right to use any card(s) or other payment method(s) in connection with any Purchase; and that (ii) the information you supply to us is true, correct and complete. We may employ the use of third-party services to facilitate payment and the completion of Purchases. By submitting your information, you grant us the right to provide the information to these third parties subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order at any time for reasons including but not limited to: product or service availability, errors in the description or price of the product or service, error in your order or other reasons. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order if fraud or an unauthorized or illegal transaction is suspected; the decision will be ours and cannot be contested.
entries.value: Más mian leat aon táirge nó seirbhís a cheannach atá ar fáil tríd an tSeirbhís (“Purchase”), d’fhéadfaí a iarraidh ort faisnéis áirithe a sholáthar atá ábhartha do do Purchase, lena n-áirítear ach gan a bheith teoranta do d’uimhir chárta creidmheasa nó dochair, dáta éaga do chárta, do sheoladh billeála, agus d’fhaisnéis loingseoireachta. Dearbhaíonn agus barántaíonn tú: (i) go bhfuil an ceart dlíthiúil agat aon chárta/í nó modh/anna íocaíochta eile a úsáid i ndáil le haon Purchase; agus (ii) go bhfuil an fhaisnéis a sholáthraíonn tú dúinn fíor, ceart agus iomlán. Féadfaimid seirbhísí tríú páirtí a úsáid chun íocaíocht agus críochnú Purchases a éascú. Trí d’fhaisnéis a chur isteach, tugann tú an ceart dúinn an fhaisnéis a sholáthar do na tríú páirtithe seo faoi réir ár bPolasaí Príobháideachais. Coimeádaimid an ceart d’ordú a dhiúltú nó a chur ar ceal ag aon am ar chúiseanna lena n-áirítear ach gan a bheith teoranta do: infhaighteacht táirge nó seirbhíse, earráidí i dtuairisc nó praghas an táirge nó na seirbhíse, earráid i d’ordú nó cúiseanna eile. Coimeádaimid an ceart d’ordú a dhiúltú nó a chur ar ceal má bhíonn amhras faoi chalaois nó idirbheart neamhúdaraithe nó mídhleathach; is linne an cinneadh agus ní féidir é a chonspóid.

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: I ndomhan ina bhfuil IS ag dul chun cinn go tapa, ní mhairfidh ach comhfhios agus cruthaitheacht an duine. Dúirt Albert Einstein uair amháin, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."

entries.source: In any way that violates any applicable national or international law or regulation. For the purpose of exploiting, harming, or attempting to exploit or harm minors in any way by exposing them to inappropriate content or otherwise To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” or any other similar solicitation. To impersonate or attempt to impersonate Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity. In any way that infringes upon the rights of others, or in any way is illegal, threatening, fraudulent, or harmful, or in connection with any unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, or harmful purpose or activity. To engage in any other conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone’s use or enjoyment of Service, or which, as determined by us, may harm or offend Company or users of Service or expose them to liability.
entries.value: Ar aon bhealach a sháraíonn aon dlí nó rialachán náisiúnta nó idirnáisiúnta infheidhme. Chun mionaoisigh a shaothrú, dochar a dhéanamh dóibh, nó iarracht a dhéanamh iad a shaothrú nó dochar a dhéanamh dóibh ar bhealach ar bith trí iad a nochtadh d’ábhar míchuí nó ar shlí eile. Chun aon ábhar fógraíochta nó cur chun cinn a tharchur, nó a chur faoi deara a sheoladh, lena n-áirítear aon “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” nó aon iarratas eile dá shamhail. Chun aithris a dhéanamh nó iarracht a dhéanamh aithris a dhéanamh ar Company, ar fhostaí Company, ar úsáideoir eile, nó ar aon duine nó eintiteas eile. Ar aon bhealach a sháraíonn cearta daoine eile, nó ar aon bhealach atá mídhleathach, bagrach, calaoiseach, nó díobhálach, nó i ndáil le haon chuspóir nó gníomhaíocht neamhdhleathach, mhídhleathach, chalaoiseach, nó dhíobhálach. Chun páirt a ghlacadh in aon iompar eile a chuireann srian nó bac ar úsáid nó taitneamh aon duine as an tSeirbhís, nó a d’fhéadfadh, mar a chinnimidne, dochar nó masla a dhéanamh do Company nó d’úsáideoirí na Seirbhíse nó iad a nochtadh do dhliteanas.

entries.source: In this guide
entries.value: Sa treoir seo

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: Cuir san áireamh an cheist, an méid a thriail tú cheana, cá ndeachaigh tú i sáinn, agus cibé acu atá leid, seiceáil céime, nó aiseolas uait.

entries.source: Include what you know, what you tried, what level you need, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: Cuir san áireamh a bhfuil ar eolas agat, cad a thriail tú, cén leibhéal atá de dhíth ort, agus cén cineál cabhrach atá uait.
